prestazioni: Engine: Ford Duratec 3.0L V6 (code: **Duratec ST300**) – Full forged internals with **Manley I-beam connecting rods**, **JE Pistons FSR261800 forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, and **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** for 22 psi boost capability. Turbocharger upgraded to **Garrett GTX4202R Gen II (84 trim, .82 A/R turbine housing)** with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** for instant spool and 650+ whp on E85.

Drivetrain: **Quaife ATB LSD (M400-specific 3.73:1 ratio)** paired with **PPG straight-cut drop gears (17-tooth input, 63-tooth output)** for zero power loss under extreme lateral G-forces. **Tilton 7.25" twin-plate ceramic clutch** with **Noble-spec billet flywheel** for 800+ ft-lb torque capacity.

Suspension & Chassis: **Öhlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers (Noble-specific valving)** with **Eibach ERS 1200N/mm helper springs** for 1.8G cornering. **Noble M400 Track Spec subframe reinforcement plates (T45 steel, 5mm thickness)** welded to chassis with **MIG-welded gussets** at stress points. **AP Racing CP8660-4 calipers (6-piston, 380mm discs)** with **Ferodo DS3000 pads** and **Goodridge 74912 braided lines** for 1,200kg stopping force from 100mph.
estetica: Aero: **Noble M400 Track Spec carbon fiber front splitter (3D-molded, 30mm overhang)** with **integrated Gurney flap** for 120kg downforce at 120mph. **Rear diffuser: Custom 3-piece carbon fiber (Noble OEM-style but extended 150mm)** with **Vortex generators** for 80kg rear downforce. **Carbon fiber rear wing: APR Performance GTC-300 (300mm chord, 900mm span, 15-degree angle)** with **adjustable endplates** for track-day optimization.

Body: **Full carbon fiber body kit (Noble M400 Track Spec, 1x1 twill weave)** including **hood, fenders (flared 30mm per side), and doors** for 45kg weight reduction. **Custom polycarbonate rear window (Lexan MR-10, 4mm thick)** with **integrated NACA duct** for engine bay cooling. **Paint: BASF Glasurit 90-Line in "Noble Racing Green" (custom mixed, 3-stage pearl with matte clear coat)** for 9H hardness.

Interior: **Sparco Pro 2000 seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA 8862-2009 certified)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM2 double-latch)**. **Momo Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel (320mm diameter, suede grip)** with **integrated AIM MXS Strada dash (12Hz data logging, 4.3" display)**. **Full Alcantara trim (Automobili Lamborghini-spec, "Nero Alcantara")** with **red contrast stitching** and **custom Noble M400 embroidery on headrests**.
